chunks.text: 2014 Rising Stars in EECS | UC Berkeley 2014 Rising Stars in EECS An Academic Career Workshop for Women Schedule Participants Workshop Chairs Speakers Invited Participants Organizers Directions Contact Past Workshops 2013 2012 This workshop brings together women who are interested in careers in academia, for two days of scientific interactions and career-oriented discussions. It will include research talks/posters as well as presentations on aspects of life in academia â from finding a faculty position to parameters of success as a junior faculty member. Participants will have the opportunity to present their ongoing research, to interact informally with our faculty members at UC Berkeley and from MIT, Stanford University, University of Washington, UC San Diego and Harvey Mudd College, and to receive advice for advancing their careers. November 3 & 4, 2014 Sutardja Dai Hall UC Berkeley Schedule Sunday, Nov. 2 07:00pm Registration & Networking Reception Hotel Shattuck Plaza Monday, Nov. 3 8:30am Breakfast Room 250, Sutardja Dai Hall 9:00am Welcome from the EECS Department Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall 9:15am Keynote Speech Dr. Jeannette Wing (Microsoft Research & Carnegie Mellon University) 9:45am Panel on career options Moderator: Dr. Sarah Bird Prof. Philip Wong (Stanford University & formerly IBM) Dr. Kelin Kuhn (Intel & formerly University of Washington) Prof. Eric Brewer (Google & UC Berkeley) Dr. Bill Dally (Nvidia and Stanford University) Prof. Katherine Yelick (UC Berkeley and Lawrence Berkeley National Lab) Dr. Deborah Crawford (ICSI, formerly NSF) 10:45am Coffee Break 11:00am Lecture Peter Khoury, founder
